invalid_cases.name: bad_definition_digest
invalid_cases.error: run_definition_digest must be a lowercase SHA-256

invalid_cases.name: partial_claim
invalid_cases.error: checkpoint claim fields must be all present or all null

invalid_cases.name: terminal_with_claim
invalid_cases.error: terminal checkpoint cannot have an active claim

invalid_cases.name: journal_cycle_not_active
invalid_cases.error: journal cycle_index must equal active claimed cycle
